series_metadata.series_description: Ohio’s Apprenticeship Program provides career opportunities that combine educational instruction with hands-on job training to provide certification and employment in industry sectors such as manufacturing, information technology, social services, health and support services, and aerospace, etc. Files include grant applications, curriculum, correspondence of compliance and quality reviews, active apprenticeship agreements, and all change in status transmittals until such time as the standards or apprenticeship agreements are canceled.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: ;Retain in office 5 years after the program ends and until audits are completed, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain in office 5 years after the program ends and until audits are completed, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
